title: 9 Signs Your Phone Is Running You, Not God
caption:
Your phone doesn't feel like an idol. It just quietly becomes the thing you check before you pray, reach for before you notice the room, and trust with more of your attention than you've given God all week.

None of these nine signs feel like addiction on their own. Stack them up and they start to look like worship pointed the wrong direction.

Silence the notifications. Not the people. Not Him.

Save this and count how many you're actually doing.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #phonefree #digitaldiscipline #scripture #brotherhood
